videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.11 — Agents
videos.description:
Why a fixed RAG pipeline is too rigid, and what an agent is: an LLM that decides which actions to take and when.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/11-agents-intro.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 2 — Agents.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.12 — Quick RAG Revision (Optional)
videos.description:
A quick recap that rebuilds the Part 1 RAG pipeline (ingest + the RAGBase class) so Part 2 is self-contained. Optional if you already did Part 1.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/12-rag-revision.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 2 — Agents.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.13 — Function Calling
videos.description:
Giving the LLM a search tool: defining the function schema, letting the model decide to call it, running the call, and sending the result back. Plus token usage and cost.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/13-function-calling.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 2 — Agents.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.14 — The Agentic Loop
videos.description:
The loop that powers every agent: call the model, run any tool calls, feed results back, and repeat until it's done. Plus the developer prompt, encouraging multiple searches, and restricting off-topic questions.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/14-agentic-loop.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 2 — Agents.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.15 — ToyAIKit
videos.description:
Using a small teaching framework that wraps the agent loop: registering tools, auto-generating the schema from a typed function, running a prompt, and continuing the conversation.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/15-frameworks.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 2 — Agents.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.16 — Other Frameworks
videos.description:
Production agent frameworks worth knowing (OpenAI Agents SDK, PydanticAI, LangChain/LangGraph, Google ADK) and a closing note on when NOT to reach for an agent.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/16-other-frameworks.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 2 — Agents.
